---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: othmastar
---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? Why is it worth doing?

## Proposed Solution
How should Adam Prism behave after this change?

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you think about?

## API Sketch (if applicable)
```python
# Endpoint, function signature, or schema
```

## UI Sketch (if applicable)
Describe the user interaction or attach a mockup.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test cases pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Backward compatible
- [ ] ruff + mypy clean
- [ ] Added example to `examples/`

## Priority
- [ ] Blocker (system unusable without it)
- [ ] High (strong user demand)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic / experimental)

## Out of Scope
What should NOT be part of this PR?
